validation.groupTaskMinTime: Group tasks must be scheduled at least 30 minutes in the future.
validation.groupActivityMinTime: Group activities must be scheduled at least 30 minutes in the future.

validation.groupActivityPastDate: Group activities cannot be scheduled for a past date.
validation.repeatDateAutoSet: Recurring tasks need a date. Date set to today.

panel.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?
panel.failedToCreate: Failed to create task. Please try again.
panel.failedToUpdate: Failed to update task. Please try again.
panel.failedToDelete: Failed to delete task. Please try again.
panel.overdueInfoContent:
When ON: Overdue tasks will also appear in today's task list so you don't miss them.

When OFF: Overdue tasks only appear on their original date in the calendar.
panel.autoDoneInfoContent:
When ON: The task will automatically be marked as complete at the end time (if duration is set), or the next day (for tasks without duration or due tasks).

When OFF: The task remains uncompleted until you manually mark it as complete.
panel.endActivityWarning: Once ended, participants can no longer mark this activity as complete.
panel.incompleteParticipants: {{incomplete}} of {{total}} participants haven't marked this activity as complete yet.
panel.noParticipants: This activity has no participants. Complete anyway?
panel.allParticipantsComplete: All participants have completed this activity.
panel.taskInstanceDateInfo: This is an occurrence of a recurring task. Changes can be applied to all occurrences or just this one. However, changing the date only affects this occurrence - it will be moved from the original date to the new date.
panel.activityInstanceDateInfo: This is an occurrence of a recurring activity. Changes can be applied to all occurrences or just this one. However, changing the date only affects this occurrence - it will be moved from the original date to the new date.
panel.taskInstanceDateChangeMessage: This task occurrence will be removed from {{originalDate}} and moved to {{newDate}}. Other occurrences will not be affected.
panel.activityInstanceDateChangeMessage: This activity occurrence will be removed from {{originalDate}} and moved to {{newDate}}. Other occurrences will not be affected.

input.dueToggleInfoContent:
Due (ON): A deadline - you must finish before this date/time. Example: "Submit report by Friday 5pm"

Scheduled (OFF): A planned time slot when you'll work on it. Example: "Team meeting at 2pm for 1 hour" - you can set duration and reminders.
input.forAllGroupMembersDesc: Each member gets their own task to complete independently
input.trackCompletionInfoContent:
When ON: Each participant can mark themselves as complete. You'll see who has completed and who hasn't.

When OFF: No completion tracking - useful for casual hangouts or optional activities where attendance doesn't need to be tracked.
input.groupActivityDateAutoSet: Date set to today. Group activities require a scheduled date.
input.cannotChangeToNormalTask: Group activities cannot be changed to regular tasks.
input.cannotChangeRepeatPattern: Repeat pattern cannot be changed for group tasks or activities.
input.participateMyselfInfoContent:
When ON: You'll be added as a participant in this activity.

When OFF: You're creating this activity for others but won't participate yourself.
input.videoPlatformNotSupported: This video platform is not supported. Added as a link.

activityHistory.title: Activity History
activityHistory.description: View your recent actions and changes. See a timeline of your task completions, edits, and other activities.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.description: Share your thoughts and suggestions with us. Your feedback helps us improve doooo for everyone.

help.title: Help & Tutorials
help.description: Learn how to use doooo with guides, tutorials, and FAQs. Get the most out of your task management experience.

notificationSettings.title: Notification Settings
notificationSettings.description: Configure which notifications you receive and how you receive them. Manage push, email, in-app, and SMS notifications.

privacySecurity.title: Privacy & Security
privacySecurity.description: Manage your privacy settings and security preferences. View active sessions and control data sharing.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Manage app cache, offline data, and backups. Export your data or clear cached information.

fontSettings.title: Font
fontSettings.description: Customize the font used throughout the app.

displaySettings.title: Display Settings
displaySettings.description: Customize how dates, times, and calendars are displayed. Set your preferred date format and week start day.
displaySettings.displayStyle3dDesc: Floating navigation bar with glass effect
displaySettings.showCompletedTasksDesc: Display completed tasks in task lists

calendarSettings.title: Calendar Settings
calendarSettings.description: Customize your calendar view preferences including timezone, default view, and event display options.

taskDefaults.title: Task Defaults
taskDefaults.description: Set default values for new tasks including priority, reminders, and categories. Save time when creating tasks.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Set and track your daily, weekly, and monthly task completion goals. Stay motivated and productive!

about.title: About doooo
about.description: Learn more about doooo, view app version, terms of service, and privacy policy information.

reportBug.title: Report a Bug
reportBug.description: Encountered an issue? Let us know the details and we'll work on fixing it. Thank you for helping us improve!

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.placeholder: Statistics and analytics will be displayed here

targetPlan.aiError: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
targetPlan.aiWelcomeNoTarget:
Hi! I can help you create personalized plans for:

- Learning new skills (music instruments, languages, coding...)
- Building daily routines & schedules
- Health & fitness goals
- Creative projects (writing, building, launching)
- Forming habits & discipline
- Event planning & logistics

Tell me what you'd like to work on and I'll build a plan for you!
